phases.title: Control Plane
exit_criteria: long-run protocol docs exist
project ledger is machine-checkable
plan-check and accept commands pass

phases.title: Gateway + Conversation
exit_criteria: PersonalGateway ingress is unified
conversation handoff prevents short-context loss

phases.title: Memory
exit_criteria: explicit personal memory enters recall bundle
memory correction and review are test-covered

phases.title: Command + Governance
exit_criteria: slash commands are schema-registered
high-risk actions require approval

phases.title: Automation
exit_criteria: cron and background tasks are durable
task lifecycle is auditable

phases.title: Channels
exit_criteria: P1 channel adapters have E2E smoke coverage

phases.title: Extensibility
exit_criteria: skills, MCP, subagents, browser and sandbox are governed

phases.title: Beyond
exit_criteria: memory wiki, dreaming, benchmark and Console governance are complete

phases.title: Baseline and Product Shell
exit_criteria: PA-BL-001 deterministic baseline passes
assistant has setup, doctor and interactive shell entry points

phases.title: Session, Identity, Security and Model
exit_criteria: session UX commands are consistent across entries
identity pairing, model fallback and secret scoping are governed

phases.title: Execution Tools and External Events
exit_criteria: file, terminal, browser, webhook, notification and task execution are productized
high-risk execution remains approval-gated and auditable

phases.title: Data, Memory, Knowledge Base and Privacy
exit_criteria: user data can be exported, deleted and frozen
knowledge, contacts and profiles affect recall and policy without cross-scope leakage

phases.title: Channels, Voice, Devices and Canvas
exit_criteria: extended channels and voice have smoke coverage
device nodes and canvas artifacts have governed E2E paths

phases.title: Ecosystem, Migration, Sandbox and Self-Learning
exit_criteria: skills, migration, advanced sandbox, MCP and self-learning loops are productized
all extension points have permission and rollback controls

phases.title: Long-Term Data, Training and Home Automation
exit_criteria: trajectory, backup and home automation paths are recoverable
long-term data remains encrypted, redacted and auditable

tasks.title: Long-run control plane
acceptance: planning docs 02-08 exist
project-ledger.json parses and validates
package scripts pa:plan-check, pa:next-task, pa:start, pa:task-check, pa:accept exist
AGENTS.md references the long-run protocol
long-run protocol requires task commits and phase pushes

tasks.title: PersonalGateway unified ingress
acceptance: WebChat, CLI and IM ingress convert to one message envelope
channel capabilities are explicit
identity and channel metadata are passed to ConversationRouter

tasks.title: Conversation handoff and short-reference continuity
acceptance: terminal session reopen preserves recent user and assistant turns
short reference questions resolve from handoff metadata
same chat id restores route without losing context

tasks.title: Explicit personal memory in recall bundle
acceptance: /remember, /forget, /correct, /memories are equivalent across enabled entries
active personal memories are injected through runtime metadata or recall bundle
memory corrections disable stale facts

tasks.title: Command registry and baseline slash commands
acceptance: /new, /status, /stop, /model, /usage and /compact are schema-registered
commands produce the same outcome across WebChat and CLI ingress
unknown commands return structured errors

tasks.title: Tool approval and command risk classification
acceptance: high-risk shell, send_message and webhook actions require approval by default
approval and denial are auditable
risk classification is visible in command output

tasks.title: Minimum background task ledger
acceptance: background tasks have created, running, succeeded, failed and cancelled states
tasks can be listed, inspected and cancelled
completion can be delivered back to origin channel

tasks.title: Minimum cron and delivery
acceptance: one-shot and recurring schedules can be created
cron entries can be paused, resumed, run and removed
cron results are delivered to configured target

tasks.title: Web search, fetch and browser connector closure
acceptance: web search and fetch outputs cite sources
browser actions are traceable
web content is marked untrusted before entering memory or reasoning

tasks.title: Telegram adapter
acceptance: Telegram inbound messages normalize to the PersonalGateway envelope
Telegram delivery supports text, markdown and status responses with explicit channel capabilities
unauthorized Telegram senders are rejected before session routing

tasks.title: Slack adapter
acceptance: Slack events normalize to the PersonalGateway envelope
Slack delivery preserves thread and markdown capability metadata
Slack signing and allowlist checks run before session routing

tasks.title: Discord adapter
acceptance: Discord messages normalize to the PersonalGateway envelope
Discord delivery supports channel, DM and thread targets with explicit capabilities
Discord bot authorization and user binding are enforced before routing

tasks.title: Email adapter with webhook and cron integration
acceptance: inbound email events enter the gateway as untrusted channel input
email delivery can be invoked by cron and background task completion
send email actions use approval and delivery trace records

tasks.title: Skills registry and AgentSkills compatibility
acceptance: SKILL.md directories are discovered and indexed with metadata
skills can be listed and invoked through governed tools or commands
skill permissions and channel visibility are enforced

tasks.title: MCP client and tool filtering
acceptance: stdio and HTTP MCP tool discovery can register tools into ToolGateway
include and exclude filters restrict MCP tools per agent
MCP outputs and resources are marked untrusted before reasoning

tasks.title: Subagent lifecycle and task panel
acceptance: parent sessions can spawn, list, inspect and cancel child agent tasks
child task state and result summaries enter the background task ledger
parent cancellation cascades to active child tasks

tasks.title: Hybrid memory search and session search
acceptance: session history is searchable by keyword, semantic text and time filters
hybrid search results carry provenance into the recall bundle
LongMemEval smoke does not regress from the current baseline

tasks.title: Docker and SSH sandbox provider
acceptance: sandbox provider SPI supports local, Docker and SSH execution targets
high-risk shell and file operations can be forced into sandbox providers
sandbox selection and command output are traceable

tasks.title: Heartbeat and standing orders
acceptance: standing orders are persisted with owner, scope, expiry and permission metadata
heartbeat runs due-only checks and silently skips when no actionable work exists
standing orders and heartbeat actions create auditable task and trace records

tasks.title: Memory wiki and claim evidence layer
acceptance: personal facts are represented as claims with evidence, freshness and contradiction metadata
wiki pages can be rebuilt from claims and source sessions
user review can approve, correct or retire claims

tasks.title: Dreaming and consolidation pipeline
acceptance: background consolidation proposes memory updates from recent sessions
proposed updates pass duplicate, conflict, privacy and injection checks
dreaming output remains reviewable before entering active memory

tasks.title: Automatic skill generation and skill regression
acceptance: successful repeated workflows can generate procedural skill candidates
generated skills must pass validation and regression tests before activation
skill versions can be disabled or rolled back

tasks.title: Multi-agent profile and channel binding
acceptance: multiple agent profiles can isolate memory, tools, policy and channel bindings
routes select the correct agent profile by user, channel and workspace
profile-level policy changes are audited

tasks.title: Trajectory data, redaction and benchmark artifacts
acceptance: assistant trajectories can be exported with trace, memory and tool provenance
private identifiers and secrets are redacted before export
benchmark artifacts can replay selected trajectories deterministically

tasks.title: Full-channel media and voice
acceptance: image, file, audio and voice inputs normalize into channel attachments
media extraction outputs are marked with provenance and sensitivity
delivery can send supported media artifacts through enabled channels

tasks.title: Console unified governance view
acceptance: Console can inspect sessions, background tasks, approvals, schedules and child agents
Console can approve, reject, pause, resume and cancel governed work
governance actions are written to audit trace records

tasks.title: Product-level Baseline Runner
acceptance: PA-BL-001 deterministic runner executes the 12-turn product chain
S1-S12 deterministic scenario matrix passes
baseline artifacts include run, transcript, events, trace, memory, tools, approvals, tasks, metrics and verdict
accepted deterministic baseline summary is generated without committing large artifacts

tasks.title: Install, onboarding, daemon and autostart
acceptance: new user can configure, start and persist the assistant with one command
daemon survives restart and can report status
setup can be rerun safely after deleting local config

tasks.title: Doctor, health and config dry-run
acceptance: doctor detects missing token, bad port, database, approval and sandbox risks
config dry-run emits machine-readable JSON
risk report includes actionable remediation

tasks.title: Real CLI/TUI product entry
acceptance: interactive assistant shell supports multiline input, command history, status stream and interrupt
CLI/TUI shares Gateway and CommandHandler behavior with WebChat
CLI/TUI passes the baseline subset

tasks.title: Session UX commands
acceptance: /retry, /undo, /personality, /insights and /trace are schema-registered
commands behave consistently across WebChat, CLI and IM
commands do not accidentally trigger model calls

tasks.title: DM pairing, allowlist and home channel
acceptance: unpaired senders cannot enter runtime
/pair binds platform identity to canonical user
revocation prevents future runtime entry and writes audit

tasks.title: Model selection, fallback and health check
acceptance: session-level model switch is visible and auditable
provider health probe reports failure modes
fallback provider handles timeout or rate limit without breaking next turn

tasks.title: Credential vault and least-secret privilege
acceptance: secrets are referenced by scoped handles instead of raw values
artifacts and sandbox environments do not expose tokens
tools can only lease credentials for authorized scopes

tasks.title: Product-level file tools
acceptance: read, write, edit, diff and rollback operate inside a governed workspace
high-risk file writes require approval
trace and artifact output match final file state

tasks.title: Terminal background process management
acceptance: background process start, poll, log, stdin, wait and kill are available
killed or failed processes leave no orphan
process lifecycle is attached to task ledger

tasks.title: Real browser profile
acceptance: browser sessions provide navigate, click, type, screenshot, PDF and snapshot actions
profile lifecycle is task-bound and cleaned up
untrusted page content markers survive into runtime observations

tasks.title: Generic webhook and Gmail Pub/Sub
acceptance: webhook requests require token authentication
valid payloads route to session or task with untrusted marker
Gmail Pub/Sub adapter creates auditable events

tasks.title: Notification policy
acceptance: quiet hours suppress normal notifications but not urgent escalations
failed primary delivery falls back to configured channel
dedupe prevents duplicate reminders

tasks.title: Task board productization
acceptance: task board exposes goals, status, artifacts, errors, retry and cancel
tasks are linked to trace and governance records
failed and cancelled tasks remain inspectable

tasks.title: User data and privacy console
acceptance: user can export, delete and freeze memory, trace, tool and artifact data
privacy operations write audit records
deleted or frozen data is not retrieved in later runs

tasks.title: Personal knowledge base ingestion
acceptance: documents can be ingested, indexed, cited, deleted and reindexed
PDF/OCR content enters artifacts with permissions
answers include citations and respect deletion

tasks.title: Contacts and relationship graph
acceptance: contact graph resolves people, organizations and channel identities
ambiguous recipients require clarification
relationship changes affect message confirmation and memory scope

tasks.title: Multi-profile product entry
acceptance: users can create, inspect and switch profiles
memory, tools, channels and policy are isolated by profile
cross-domain leakage tests pass with zero failures

tasks.title: WhatsApp, Signal, WeChat, Matrix and Teams channels
acceptance: each enabled channel passes pairing, send, receive, approval, handoff and memory smoke
channel capabilities are explicit
unsupported platform features degrade safely

tasks.title: STT/TTS and push-to-talk
acceptance: voice input transcription enters runtime
assistant TTS output can be delivered
STT/TTS failures fall back to text

tasks.title: Desktop and mobile nodes
acceptance: node pairing and capability manifests work
device permissions gate camera, screen, location and canvas commands
at least one node simulator E2E passes

tasks.title: Canvas and artifact surface
acceptance: agent can create, update, version, preview and roll back artifacts
canvas output is visible in WebChat or Console
malicious scripts are constrained by sandbox or CSP

tasks.title: Skills marketplace and install audit
acceptance: skills can be searched, installed, audited, enabled and disabled
skill permissions and risk are visible before enablement
install and disable actions are audited

tasks.title: OpenClaw and Hermes migration
acceptance: migration dry-run imports persona, memory, skills, allowlist and channels
duplicate records are detected and reported
real import is reversible or creates rollback artifact

tasks.title: Advanced sandbox backend
acceptance: at least one remote or serverless sandbox backend is integrated
task hibernate and resume metadata are preserved
secrets are deny-by-default and cost/lifecycle is visible

tasks.title: MCP product governance
acceptance: MCP discovery, include/exclude and dynamic refresh are available
MCP secrets are filtered
untrusted MCP results are marked and audited

tasks.title: Self-learning skill loop productization
acceptance: successful workflows generate candidate skills
candidate skills pass regression before activation
failed skill versions can be rolled back

tasks.title: Trajectory training data pipeline
acceptance: batch trajectory generation, compression and redaction run end to end
generated trajectories can be replayed
eval and training artifacts pass schema validation

tasks.title: Backup, restore, sync and encryption
acceptance: one-command backup and restore work in a fresh HOME
sync conflict reports are readable
sensitive backup data is encrypted

tasks.title: Home Assistant and IoT
acceptance: Home Assistant entity discovery works against fixture server
dangerous actions require dry-run and approval
state readback and audit are recorded after execution
